content: Archie: I swear, this city is like a festering cunt. The Gentry think they can just suck the life out of everyone, and the Tommies are too busy getting their rocks off to notice. You think the Vagabonds have a chance against those pricks from the Isle of Dogs? Yvette: It's a rough game, sweetie. The Vagabonds have spirit, but the Syndicate has muscle. It's not just about who's got the bigger stick—it's about who knows how to use it. And as for the rest of this shithole, well, let's just say, you have to be pretty damn creative to survive in this city.
Yvette: It's a tough playfield out there, but someone's got to balance the scales. Just keep your wits about you, Archie. One bad move, and this city's the last place you'll ever see.

Archie: Look around you, Yvette. This place is a fucking cesspit. All these gangs, the Gentry, the 5th Column—they’re all rotting away the city with their degenerate lifestyles. I just want to see some order, some respect for tradition. Not this chaotic bullshit where everyone’s fucking or killing each other.

Yvette: I understand your frustration, Archie. But remember, surviving in this city isn't just about fighting or fucking. It's about strategy, alliances, and knowing when to hold back. The Gentry may be corrupt, and the gangs violent, but anyone can fall if they don't play the game right.

Yvette: So, Archie, you're still convinced that diving headfirst into a firefight with the Syndicate is the smartest move in this city? Archie: Of course, it's the only way, Yvette. We can't just stand around letting those fucks take over. MJR needs our help, and if that means getting our hands dirty and maybe feeling a little something something when the blood hits the floor, so be it. Fuck waiting around for some alliance to save us. We got this. Now, are you going to join us or just sit there admiring your reflection?

Archie: Fine, do what you want, Yvette. But don't say I didn't warn you when we're all polishing the Gentry's boots instead of taking back what's ours. Just remember, every action has a reaction, and in this city, it's usually a bullet.

Yvette: So, Archie, you're still gunning for the Syndicate, are you? Think you and MJR can take them all on without a proper plan? This city isn't just about spirit, darling; it's about knowing when to fight and when to fuck off.
Archie: Fine, Yvette, don't come with us. But just remember, when the Syndicate comes knocking, and they will, don't say I didn't warn you. Now, let's focus on MJR and getting the job done.
